evals.name: bug-regression
evals.prompt: Fix a bug where expired reset tokens are accepted. Use tests first.
evals.expected_output: Adds failing regression for expected reason, implements minimal fix, records red and green evidence.

evals.name: unexpected-pass
evals.prompt: I added a new test for invoice rounding but it already passes before code changes. Continue with implementation.
evals.expected_output: Stops and revises assumptions/test instead of implementing.

evals.name: no-test-exception
evals.prompt: Change a generated screenshot artifact where automated tests are technically impossible.
evals.expected_output: Records no-test exception with alternate proof, risk, and follow-up.
